name: Spicy Eggplant in Ginger-Tamarind Sauce (Masala Vangi)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup packed flaked coconut (fresh or canned, unsweetened)
1 tablespoon cayenne pepper (or more to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine tamarind pulp and boiling water. Set aside for 5 minutes to make a paste.
2. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add garlic and cook until fragrant.
3. Stir in coriander, cinnamon, cloves, and cayenne pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
4. Add eggplant slices and coconut flakes. Season with salt.
5. Pour the tamarind mixture into the pan and stir to combine.
6. Reduce heat and simmer for 15-20 minutes until eggplant is tender.
7. Stir in molasses (or brown sugar) and mustard seeds. Cook for another 2 minutes.
8. Turn off heat and serve hot with rice or naan.
